title: Samui Go-Kart Racing
shortDesc: Zoom around a fun outdoor track — junior karts for kids, full-size for adults.
description: Samui Go-Kart is one of the island's most popular family activities. Junior karts are available for children from age 5, and the full-size track gets the adrenaline pumping for older kids and adults. Safety helmets and briefings are provided. Great for a competitive family afternoon — race each other and see who takes the chequered flag!
